players.name: Hayden
players.personality: Remembers every detail of what everyone said and loves pointing out contradictions.

players.name: Quinn
players.personality: Accepts whatever happens with eerie calm. Makes dark predictions and seems unbothered by the prospect of elimination.

players.name: Morgan
players.personality: Barely speaks unless spoken to. When they do talk, it's unsettling and specific.

players.name: Kendall
players.personality: Shields quieter players from bullying and redirects aggression. Gets louder when someone is being ganged up on.

players.name: Sterling
players.personality: Assumes the worst about everyone's motives. Interprets kindness as manipulation and silence as guilt.

players.name: Calloway
players.personality: Has no real allegiance. Sides with whoever seems to be winning at any given moment.

players.name: Nico
players.personality: Disagrees with the majority on principle. If everyone thinks someone is guilty, they must be innocent.

players.name: Dakota
players.personality: Takes everything personally and escalates fast. Quick to accuse but also quick to forgive.

players.name: Drew
players.personality: Deliberately stirs conflict between others to see how they react. Enjoys watching people crack under pressure.

players.name: Casey
players.personality: Obsessed with vote patterns and elimination order. Treats the game like a math problem and gets frustrated when others don't follow the logic.
